# SHIPPED: Upstream Features Port

> Feature shipped on 2026-04-24

## Metadata

| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Feature** | UPSTREAM_FEATURES |
| **Ship Date** | 2026-04-24 |
| **Author** | ship-agent |

---

## Summary

Ported six components from the upstream [luanmorenommaciel/agentspec](https://github.com/luanmorenommaciel/agentspec) into the `Arthur1511/agentspec-copilot` GitHub Copilot CLI fork. The port adds a project status skill, an intelligent agent router with its machine-readable manifest, consolidated guides for data engineering and the SDD workflow, the Python script that regenerates the routing manifest from agent frontmatter, and a full project changelog. All components were adapted from Claude Code conventions (`.claude/` paths, slash commands, `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`) to Copilot CLI conventions (`.github/` paths, skill references, `${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}`). The plugin now ships 35 skills (up from 31).

## What Was Built

### Components

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `core-status` skill | Project status report: scans SDD workspace, git state, and codebase health |
| `agent-router` skill | Routing table for all 58 agents — generated file with category tables, KB index, one-liners |
| `routing.json` | Machine-readable agent manifest (58 agents, 8 categories, hash `d5d808a0df75`) |
| `data-engineering-guide` skill | Consolidated DE entry-point routing to 15 DE agents and 8 data engineering skills |
| `sdd-workflow` skill | 5-phase SDD quick-reference with skill names and output artifacts |
| `scripts/generate-agent-router.py` | Regenerates `agent-router` outputs from `.github/agents/*.agent.md` frontmatter |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | Fork `[Unreleased]` section + full upstream history from v1.0.0 through v3.1.0 |

### Files

|------|---------|
| `.github/skills/core-status/SKILL.md` | Status reporting skill (280 lines) |
| `.github/skills/agent-router/SKILL.md` | Generated routing tables (237 lines) |
| `.github/skills/agent-router/routing.json` | Machine-readable routing manifest (620 lines) |
| `.github/skills/data-engineering-guide/SKILL.md` | DE guide skill (53 lines) |

## Lessons Learned

### Process

- Running `/iterate` before coding — to fetch and study upstream source files — saved a full build rewrite. The first attempt at `core-status` was rejected because it didn't reflect upstream content; `/iterate` resolved this by establishing "match upstream content, adapt paths" as the explicit contract.
- The SDD phases (Define → Design → Build → Ship) enforced a clean dependency graph: the generator script was built first, then its output was used for agent-router. Without the DESIGN doc's dependency notation, this ordering could have been missed.

### Technical

- **Flat vs nested directories**: Upstream organizes agents in category subdirs (`.claude/agents/de/`, `.claude/agents/cloud/`). This fork uses a single flat dir (`.github/agents/`) with category encoded in the filename prefix. The generator script's `stem.split("-")[0]` pattern is the key adaptation — simple and robust.
- **Model name normalization**: Upstream short-form model labels (`sonnet`, `opus`) differ from this fork's long-form frontmatter values (`Claude Sonnet 4.5`). Adding `normalize_model()` to the script is the correct single-responsibility fix.
- **Generated files**: The agent-router SKILL.md is a `DO NOT EDIT` generated artifact in upstream. Respecting this pattern in the fork — adapting the generator rather than hand-editing the output — ensures the router stays synchronized with agents automatically.
- **`uv run` as Python runner**: The project has no `python` on PATH; `uv run` is the standard and requires no venv or requirements.txt for stdlib-only scripts.

### Communication

- User's `/iterate` message ("skill should have the same content as in luanmorenommaciel/agentspec, but adapted to copilot cli") was the critical clarification that unlocked the correct approach — fetch upstream source first, then adapt. Earlier builds without this context produced structurally correct but content-empty skills.

### Tools & Libraries

- `uv run` — zero-setup Python execution; ideal for stdlib-only scripts in this repo
- `build-copilot.ps1 --check` equivalent: running the build and checking `Skills: 35` in output is sufficient CI for skill additions
- `generate-agent-router.py --check`: the upstream's drift-detection pattern is valuable for CI; preserved in the fork

---

## Recommendations for Future Work

| Area | Recommendation |
|------|----------------|
| CI integration | Add `uv run scripts/generate-agent-router.py --check` to `.github/workflows/plugin-validate.yml` to catch router drift on every push |
| Skill count in manifest | Update `manifest.yaml` skill count from 31 to 35 as a follow-up maintenance task |
| Upstream sync | Periodically diff `luanmorenommaciel/agentspec` against this fork; use `/define` to capture new components to port |
| `core-status` enhancement | Add stack-detection logic (dbt, Spark, Airflow file patterns) to match upstream's `init-workspace.sh` auto-detection |
